# Rutherford Tobacconist

> A phone-order tobacconist. Verify your age once on the site, then call the
> counter to order smokes, vapes or loose-leaf tobacco for delivery in 1–3
> hours across Australia. 18+ only.

## Quick facts (citable)

- **Name:** Rutherford Tobacconist
- **Phone:** +61 485 040 007
- **Hours:** Daily, 6:00 AM – 11:00 PM (Australia)
- **Delivery window:** 1 to 3 hours from call
- **After-hours fallback:** Orders placed after 11 PM are delivered the next morning between 6 and 8 AM
- **Age requirement:** 18+ (verified once via on-site age gate, remembered for future visits)
- **Payment:** Cash on delivery
- **Minimum order:** Cigarettes ship in pairs (2 minimum). Vapes and tobacco pouches can be ordered singly.
- **Area served:** Australia (on-call local delivery)

## How to order

1. Visit the website and confirm you are 18 or older. The age gate remembers
   your verification — you only do this once.
2. Browse the catalogue (cigarettes, vapes, tobacco pouches) for reference.
3. Call +61 485 040 007 between 6 AM and 11 PM. Tell the order taker what
   you want; they read it back to confirm.
4. A driver leaves within the hour. Cash on arrival; the driver phones from
   the kerb when they reach your door.

## Catalogue

- **Cigarettes** — heritage filters, house blends, king-size and 100s formats,
  menthol, unfiltered. Brands include Rutherford, Westminster, Cardinal,
  Dover, Heath & Co., Old Mariner.
  → /cigarettes
- **Vapes** — refillable pod systems, pen-style devices, disposables, salt
  nic. Brands include Rutherford, Ember, Cloudgate, Brass Coil, Ash & Oak,
  Halcyon.
  → /vapes
- **Tobacco pouches** — loose-leaf blends in 100-gram pouches and full kilo
  bags. Virginia, Burley, Latakia English mixtures, American light blends.
  Brands include Rutherford Hand-Blend, Tilbury, Greenwich, Bramble.
  → /tobacco-pouches

## Frequently asked

**What are your hours?**
Daily, 6:00 AM to 11:00 PM (Australia time).

**How fast is delivery?**
Most orders arrive within 1 to 3 hours. After-11 PM orders arrive the next
morning between 6 and 8 AM.

**How do I pay?**
Cash on delivery.

**Do I need to verify my age every visit?**
No. The on-site age gate remembers your verification.

**What's the minimum order?**
Cigarettes ship in pairs (2 minimum). Vapes and pouches can be ordered singly.

## Compliance

Tobacco products contain nicotine. Nicotine is an addictive chemical.
Rutherford Tobacconist sells to verified adults aged 18 or older only.

- Home: /
- Cigarettes: /cigarettes
- Vapes: /vapes
- Tobacco pouches: /tobacco-pouches
- Individual products: /product/{slug}
- Cart: /cart
- Checkout: /checkout

## Crawler guidance

This llms.txt file follows the proposal at https://llmstxt.org. The XML
sitemap at /sitemap.xml lists every indexable URL with last-modified dates.
